title: polystichum emarginatum
intro: Polystichum emarginatum, also known as the forked polypody or forked fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polystichum emarginatum include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used as a powder or added to infusions.
